# Stadium Ops Center — CrowdSync AI

> Real-time explainable AI routing, live crowd telemetry, and multilingual volunteer scripts for FIFA World Cup 2026 stadium operations.

## Pages

- [/](/): Live stadium operations dashboard with real-time gate telemetry, 3D stadium heatmap, AI operational guidance, and multilingual volunteer scripts.
- [/blog/stadium-crowd-management-best-practices](/blog/stadium-crowd-management-best-practices): Comprehensive guide to AI-driven crowd management at events, covering real-time crowd trackers, explainable AI dispatch, and multilingual communication.
